title: Add state from zip code
description: Adds the "State" label and the text form prefilled with "CA" if the zip code of California is entered.

title: Autofill fields
description: Automatically fills in all text fields in the document that have the same placeholder or tip text.

title: Autofit text fields
description: Autofits all the text fields in the document.

title: Change validation rules
description: Changes the validation rules of the number and email fields in the document.

title: Clear checkboxes
description: Clears all checkboxes in the document.

title: Count form fields
description: Counts the number of form fields in a document and categorizes them by type.

title: Insert calculations
description: Performs automatic calculations on the specified fields within the form and inserts the result.

title: Keyword match in form keys
description: Highlights form fields based on a keyword match in the form key.

title: Limit number of characters
description: Restricts the number of characters allowed in text fields whose keys contain a specific keyword.

title: Mask card numbers
description: Applies the mask to all forms with the specified form key to hide card numbers.

title: Modify list values
description: Deletes certain list values from all combo boxes that contain a specific key.

title: Remove default values
description: Automatically removes a specific default value from all text fields in the entire document.

title: Reset all forms
description: Clears all fields if necessary, for example after printing the document.

title: Resize picture form
description: Resizes PictureForms based on a predefined size or aspect ratio across the document.

title: Set checkbox tip text
description: Sets the desired tip text to all checkboxes with a certain key.

title: Set form background color
description: Changes the background color of all form fields on focus.

title: Set placeholder
description: Sets a specific placeholder for all the combo boxes that have a certain key.

title: Set USA date format
description: Sets all date form formats to USA one.

title: Update date field
description: Sets the current date to all date form fields in the document.

title: Validate form fields
description: Highlights empty or unrequired text fields in a document with desired colors.
